data.content: Removed the extra inner box from the Repositories settings section, added a dispatch icon/title row so Agent Dispatch matches the other sections, and replaced the gradient Save button with a flatter solid primary treatment. Verified with bun run lint (warnings only, 0 errors), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and NODE_ENV=production bun run build. Pushed directly to origin/main as 13aa7e0.
